title: boophone disticha
intro: Boophone disticha is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae, commonly known as a poisonous lily. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction by boiling the roots or rhizomes in water, although it is essential to exercise extreme caution when handling this plant due to its toxicity.
